name: Singularity Strike
short_description: Are you ready to aid Era-bus in its relentless quest for vengeance and consume everything in your path? Defeat the Hu-bon empire in this unique SHMUP/STG experience!
detailed_description:
Are you ready to aid Era-bus in its relentless quest for vengeance and consume everything in your path? Download now and experience the beginning of an epic cosmic revenge saga in Singularity Strike!

Gameplay

Master the art of destruction with intuitive controls:

Directional Arrows: Navigate Erebus across the vast expanse.

Mouse: Aim with precision and wreak havoc.

Mouse 1: Fire your primary weapon.

Mouse 2: Activate the devastating Black Hole Bomb.

Features

Strong Narrative: Follow the quest of Era-bus on a mission to take revenge on the humanoids thats kept it captive. Uncover the secrets of BCAT - Blackhole Consciouness Acquisition Theory...

Four Unique Weapons: Customize your devastation with a variety of weaponry, each with unique effects.

Five Levels: Explore and dominate the GN-z11 Galaxy while experiencing a unique Sci-Fi narrative.
